# Pure Wipe 3.0

**Stack:** .NET 9 · Razor Pages · Bootstrap 5 · Decap CMS · JSON/MD content layer  
**Generated by:** WFO (Web Factory Orchestrator)  
**Hub project slug:** `purewide3`

---

## Local Development

```bash
cd purewide3
dotnet restore
dotnet run
```

App runs at `https://localhost:5001` by default.  
Decap CMS admin: `https://localhost:5001/admin/`

## VPS Deployment

Deployment is automated via GitHub Actions (`.github/workflows/deploy.yml`).

**Required secrets in repository Settings → Secrets:**

| Secret | Description |
|--------|-------------|
| `SERVER_IP` | VPS IP or hostname |
| `USERNAME` | SSH user with sudo rights |
| `PASSWORD` | SSH password |
| `PORT` | SSH port (optional, default 22) |
| `SHARED_DOMAIN` | Base domain serving multiple apps |
| `SHARED_SITE_FILE` | Nginx sites-available filename |

App is deployed to `/var/www/purewide3` and accessible at `https://{domain}/purewide3/`.

## Content Management

Content is managed via Decap CMS at `/admin/`.  
Content files are stored in `wwwroot/content/` and tracked by Git.

- Products: `wwwroot/content/products/*.json`
- Blog posts: `wwwroot/content/blog/*.md`
- Pages: `wwwroot/content/pages/*.json`

## Architecture

No SQL, no Entity Framework. All content is Git-backed JSON/Markdown.
